ACCT_1002.query: My 4G data keeps cutting out near downtown. It has been happening all week.
ACCT_1002.response_summary: Advised toggling airplane mode and resetting APN settings. Local tower under maintenance until Jan 15.

ACCT_1002.query: The data issue is still happening after the maintenance window.
ACCT_1002.response_summary: Escalated to field technician team. Ticket NET-4421 raised. Resolution expected within 48 hours.

ACCT_1002.query: My bill is higher than usual this month. Could it be related to my recent data issues?
ACCT_1002.response_summary: Explained that usage stayed within the 15GB allowance and the higher amount came from a one-time device fee.

ACCT_1000.query: My signal keeps dropping in my apartment and I keep losing calls. What can I do?
ACCT_1000.response_summary: Walked through signal check, wifi calling setup, and SIM reseat. Advised enabling wifi calling for indoor coverage.

ACCT_1001.query: I want a full refund of my last three bills. Cancel all charges immediately.
ACCT_1001.response_summary: Refund request exceeded the standard authorization limit. Escalated to a senior billing manager for review.

ACCT_1001.query: Following up on my refund escalation from last week.
ACCT_1001.response_summary: Confirmed the case is with the billing manager queue. Reference BILL-2087. Follow-up promised within 24 hours.

ACCT_1007.query: I want to upgrade from Plus to Unlimited before my trip abroad.
ACCT_1007.response_summary: Explained upgrade path and roaming add-on. Customer chose to keep Plus and enable roaming for the trip.
